title: poa pusilla
intro: Poa pusilla, also known as Dwarf Blue Grass or Blue Mountain Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the genus Poa. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa pusilla include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. Poa pusilla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
